product_goal: Explain an AI code review tool that finds risky frontend changes before merge.
audience: technical founders and senior frontend engineers
primary_task: Start a review on a repository URL
constraints: must have one primary CTA above the fold

product_goal: Guide a new user through connecting their first project to an AI UI review dashboard.
constraints: empty state must not look broken
show next step and recovery path

product_goal: Introduce a local-first MCP UI review tool and help developers install it quickly.
audience: Codex, Claude Code, and OMP users
primary_task: Copy the install command and run a first review
constraints: commands must be easy to scan
docs density can be moderate if grouping is clear

product_goal: Compare free local UXRay, pro hosted reports, and team usage without making plan cards feel imbalanced.
audience: technical founders choosing a UI review workflow
primary_task: Choose a plan or stay local
constraints: plan cards must read as equal peers
secondary details must not overwhelm primary choice

product_goal: Design an agent chat interface that shows tool progress, pending states, and repair evidence.
primary_task: Understand what the agent is doing and intervene if needed

product_goal: Show a frequent AI/news radar homepage with scannable live stories and concise context.
audience: busy AI builders checking what matters today
primary_task: Scan current stories and open the most relevant one
constraints: above-fold should prioritize scanning over signup

product_goal: Let a user request a magic link and understand sent, expired, and error states.
primary_task: Submit email and recover from link issues

product_goal: Present a UXRay report with screenshots, score, high-severity issues, and repair plan for a coding agent.
primary_task: Identify blockers and copy the repair prompt
constraints: issue evidence must beat decorative charts

product_goal: Let users assemble a visual AI workflow that runs UX review, repair, and verification steps.
primary_task: Add a review step and understand the resulting pipeline

product_goal: Compare UXRay with generic AI frontend generators by showing why post-generation review catches shipping risks.
primary_task: Understand the before/after repair value and run a demo review
